patches.name: command-panel-msgdat-groupfix
patches.desc: Repoint FUN_0057aa90 command/authority panel labels from constmsg group 0x5f to group 0x60 for subIds 4..0x12. Group 0x5f has only four command-status strings; group 0x60 has the consumed panel labels. Dynamic subIds 0..3 remain on group 0x5f.
patches.verified: RE 2026-06-30: FUN_00522010 has no group-index correction; installed and extracted constmsg offset tables both give group 0x5f=2957..2960 and group 0x60=2961..2980. Raw disasm at FUN_0057aa90 shows push subId; push 0x5f; mov ecx,0x2217400; call 0x522010. Same-length immediate patches verified against installed G7MTClient.exe.
